key.name: update-interval
key.description: How often to recalculate moon phase data, in seconds. Default is 3600 (1 hour). Range: 900 (15 min) to 86400 (24 hours).

key.name: hemisphere
key.description: Select your hemisphere. In the southern hemisphere, moon phases appear horizontally mirrored.

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Which panel box to place the indicator in: 'left', 'center', or 'right'.
